body.title: Move Tool + registry from wild_igor/igor/tools/registry.py → lab/utility_closet/
body.result: Registry moved to lab/utility_closet/registry.py with AgentBase parent (9ae6ed32). Budget and filesystem shelves fully flipped to UC-canonical with wild_igor shims (a2450562). 255 tools still register cleanly via both paths; identity preserved. Remaining UC→wild_igor deps are lazy (paths, system_proxy, log_error) — accepted per ticket, no circulars. Test baseline unchanged: 10 pre-existing fails, 3215 passing.
body.description:
Prerequisite for the full inversion of T-uc-budget-shelf (partial, 44db598a) and T-uc-filesystem-shelf (partial, 62f8c342). Currently those modules live at wild_igor/igor/tools/<name>.py with UC shims pointing at them; the canonical direction is the reverse (UC owns the implementation). Reversing requires their dependencies — Tool, registry, DatabaseProxy, log_error — to all import cleanly from UC without circling back through wild_igor/igor/tools/__init__.py during load.

## Scope
- Move Tool class + registry singleton from wild_igor/igor/tools/registry.py to lab/utility_closet/registry.py
- Update internal imports (non-breaking): wild_igor/igor/tools/registry.py becomes a re-export shim
- DatabaseProxy already lives at lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py (T-uc-db-proxy-shelf done) — verify the current import pattern
- forensic_logger.log_error: still in wild_igor/igor/cognition/forensic_logger.py; leave for now (UC → wild_igor cross-layer is OK for logging; that's a separate ticket if we want to clean it up)
- Once registry lives in UC, flip T-uc-budget-shelf and T-uc-filesystem-shelf to have UC be canonical (the docstring explaining 'why partial' becomes 'full' and the shim direction reverses)

## Acceptance
- `from lab.utility_closet.registry import Tool, registry` works
- `from wild_igor.igor.tools.registry import Tool, registry` still works via shim
- No circular import when lab.utility_closet.budget imports registry natively
- Budget shelf flipped to UC-canonical (separate follow-up commit)
- Filesystem shelf flipped to UC-canonical
- All tests pass

## Related
- T-uc-budget-shelf partial (44db598a) — blocked by this
- T-uc-filesystem-shelf partial (62f8c342) — blocked by this
- T-uc-db-proxy-shelf (done) — the template for this kind of move
- T-uc-module-migration-epic (closed) — parent

## Provenance
2026-04-19 sprint: discovered during T-uc-budget-shelf when the circular-import failure made the inversion direction untenable until registry moves.
